name: gtm-ontology-builder
description: Build an agent-ready business ontology for GTM systems (Pipedrive, HubSpot, Attio, Salesforce, email marketing, ERP). Maps CRM objects, custom fields, pipelines, automations, agent actions, loops, and KPIs into a 4-layer machine-readable model. Bundles the renderer, linter, JSON schemas, and a complete worked example with a linked company-context tree.
